root_cause.text: The webconsole servlets (including the Gogo console) were registered with an "alias" property, which caused the Pax Web Extender Whiteboard to automatically expose them at unsecured root URLs (e.g., `/gogo`) bypassing the standard authentication enforced at the `/system/console` path.
root_cause.evidence: The patch removes the `props.put("alias", "/...");` lines from `Activator.java` files in the webconsole features, gogo, and instance components, preventing the Whiteboard pattern from mapping them to unauthenticated paths.

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: The webconsole servlets (including the Gogo console) were registered with an "alias" property, which caused the Pax Web Extender Whiteboard to automatically expose them at unsecured root URLs (e.g., `/gogo`) bypassing the standard authentication enforced at the `/system/console` path.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The patch removes the `props.put("alias", "/...");` lines from `Activator.java` files in the webconsole features, gogo, and instance components, preventing the Whiteboard pattern from mapping them to unauthenticated paths.

intent_record.intent_summary: Remove unnecessary alias property from servlet registration.
intent_record.what: Removed the alias property from the properties dictionary.
intent_record.how: Prevents the servlet from being registered with an unnecessary or conflicting alias property.

intent_record.intent_summary: Remove the explicitly set alias property for the gogo servlet registration.
intent_record.what: Removed the line setting the 'alias' property in the dictionary.
intent_record.how: Prevents the servlet from being registered with the explicit '/gogo' alias, altering its registration properties.

intent_record.intent_summary: Remove alias property from servlet registration to fix configuration.
intent_record.what: Removed the 'alias' property assignment from the properties dictionary.
intent_record.how: Prevents the servlet from being registered with the '/instance' alias.

grouping_result.intent: Remove alias property from servlet registration to fix configuration.

consistency_review.core_intent: Remove the alias property from servlet registrations to fix configuration issues.

relevance_review.reason: The group's intent to remove the alias property from servlet registrations directly addresses the root cause of the vulnerability, which was the insecure exposure of servlets due to this exact property.

candidates.rationale: Registers the 'features' webconsole servlet with an 'alias' property, leading to unsecured access via Pax Web Extender.
Registers the 'gogo' webconsole servlet with an 'alias' property, exposing it at an unsecured root URL.
Registers the 'instance' webconsole servlet with an 'alias' property, making it vulnerable to unsecured access.

vuln_statements.explanation: This statement registers the 'gogo' servlet with an 'alias' property, which causes it to be exposed at an unsecured root URL, directly matching the root cause.
This statement registers the 'features' servlet with an 'alias' property, leading to unsecured access via Pax Web Extender.
This statement registers the 'instance' servlet with an 'alias' property, making it vulnerable to unsecured access.

bic_trace_step.commit_msg: [KARAF-3843] Get rid of blueprint dependency in the web console
bic_trace_step.code_snippet:
commit f032ce95d41c50e01eb785ecd921eedef9b40d9e
Author: Guillaume Nodet <gnodet@apache.org>
Date:   Thu Jul 9 11:21:04 2015 +0200

    [KARAF-3843] Get rid of blueprint dependency in the web console

diff --git a/webconsole/gogo/src/main/java/org/apache/karaf/webconsole/gogo/Activator.java b/webconsole/gogo/src/main/java/org/apache/karaf/webconsole/gogo/Activator.java
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000..4825600410
--- /dev/null
+++ b/webconsole/gogo/src/main/java/org/apache/karaf/webconsole/g
bic_trace_step.reason: The doStart() method clearly contains the vulnerable construct: `props.put("alias", "/gogo");` followed by `register(Servlet.class, gogoPlugin, props);`. This registers the Gogo console with the 'alias' property, triggering the vulnerability.

new file mode 100644

--- /dev/null
+++ b/webconsole/features/src/main/java/org/apach
bic_trace_step.reason: The commit introduces the registration of the servlet using the 'alias' property (`props.put("alias", "/features");`), which causes it to be automatically exposed at the unsecured root URL by the Pax Web Extender Whiteboard, introducing the vulnerability.

bic_trace_step.commit_msg: [KARAF-3843] Get rid of blueprint dependency in the web console
bic_trace_step.code_snippet:
commit f032ce95d41c50e01eb785ecd921eedef9b40d9e
Author: Guillaume Nodet <gnodet@apache.org>
Date:   Thu Jul 9 11:21:04 2015 +0200

    [KARAF-3843] Get rid of blueprint dependency in the web console

diff --git a/webconsole/instance/src/main/java/org/apache/karaf/webconsole/instance/Activator.java b/webconsole/instance/src/main/java/org/apache/karaf/webconsole/instance/Activator.java
new file mode 100644

--- /dev/null
+++ b/webconsole/instance/src/main/java/org/apach
bic_trace_step.reason: The commit introduces the vulnerable construct by adding `props.put("alias", "/instance");` when registering the servlet. This "alias" property causes the Pax Web Extender Whiteboard to expose the servlet at an unsecured root URL, which is the exact root cause of the vulnerability.
